summary: Persistent public artifact published on GitHub Pages for delayed url.live verifier validation. The Frantic delivery system schedules a delayed recheck with blocks_acceptance true, deferring acceptance until the recheck fires after the not_before window. This delivery proves the scheduler and retention model end to end with real timestamps.
contract: delayed url.live in check_schedules with blocks_acceptance true

observations.detail: Persistent public artifact hosted on GitHub. The repo and its pages serve as the target for url.live verifier checks.
The Frantic verifier checks that the public URL returns a live HTTP response. This is the standard url.live verifier.
The verifier runner defers the scheduled check until the not_before window passes. blocks_acceptance true means the delivery cannot be accepted until the recheck completes.

observations.value: Immediate checks pass before the delayed check is scheduled
observations.detail: When the delivery is submitted, the immediate verifier checks run first. These pass, confirming the artifact is live.

observations.value: Delayed url.live recheck is scheduled and enters waiting state
observations.detail: After immediate checks pass, the delayed recheck is scheduled. The delivery enters a waiting state until the not_before window passes.

observations.value: Recheck fires after the not_before window
observations.detail: After the delay window passes, the verifier runner fires the scheduled url.live recheck against the public URL.

observations.value: Final receipt reflects the delayed recheck result
observations.detail: The final delivery receipt includes the result of the delayed recheck, proving the scheduler and retention model works end to end.

observations.value: immediate-pass -> scheduled waiting -> post-window recheck -> final receipt
observations.detail: The full timestamped sequence: immediate checks pass, delayed recheck scheduled and waiting, recheck fires after window, final receipt reflects the complete timeline.
